common.tagline: Create Your Wasiat & Will With Ease

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noDocuments: No documents yet. Start by creating a new document.

documentType.chooseSubtitle: Select the type of document you wish to create
documentType.wasiatDesc: For Muslim testators. Follows Syariah law and faraid.
documentType.generalWillDesc: For non-Muslims. Follows the Wills Act 1959 Malaysia.

step1.title: Testator Information
step1.religionConfirm: I confirm that I am a Muslim

step2.title: Movable Assets (Harta Alih)
step2.optionADesc: List each asset individually. Assets will be compiled into Lampiran A.
step2.optionBDesc: The Wasiat will include a general paragraph covering all movable assets.

step4.title: Beneficiaries
step4.notice: You may only bequeath up to 1/3 of your total estate to non-heirs. The remaining 2/3 will be distributed according to Faraid.
step4.exceeds: Warning: Total allocation exceeds the allowed 1/3 limit.

step5.title: Executor (Wasi)
step5.muslimNote: The executor (Wasi) must be a Muslim.

step6.title: Witnesses (Saksi)
step6.notice: Witnesses must not be beneficiaries named in this Wasiat.

step7.title: Declaration
step7.acknowledgement: I confirm that all information provided is true and accurate, and I am making this Wasiat of my own free will without coercion.
step7.disclaimer: WasiatHub provides a document generation service only and does not constitute legal advice. Please consult a Syariah officer to ensure this Wasiat meets your specific needs.

step2.title: Assets
step2.epfNote: EPF nomination is separate from a Will. This section is for reference only.

step3.title: Beneficiaries
step3.residualEstateDesc: Any assets not specifically assigned shall go to:

step6.title: Witnesses
step6.notice: Witnesses must not be beneficiaries or spouses of beneficiaries named in this Will.

step7.title: Declaration
step7.acknowledgement: I confirm that all information provided is true and accurate, and I am making this Will of my own free will without coercion.
step7.disclaimer: WasiatHub provides a document generation service only and does not constitute legal advice. For this Will to be legally valid, it must be signed in the presence of 2 witnesses who are not beneficiaries.

review.title: Review & Preview
review.incompleteWarning: Please complete all required sections before proceeding.

payment.title: Payment
payment.successMessage: Your document has been generated and sent to your email.
payment.failedMessage: Your payment was not successful. Your draft is saved — please try again.

postPayment.wasiatNotice: For this Wasiat to take full legal effect, it must be signed in front of 2 Muslim witnesses and registered with the relevant State Islamic Religious Department.
postPayment.willNotice: For this Will to be legally valid under the Wills Act 1959, it must be signed in front of 2 witnesses who are not beneficiaries.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: WasiatHub provides a document generation service only and does not constitute legal advice. Users are advised to consult a lawyer or Syariah officer to ensure the document meets their specific needs. WasiatHub is not liable for any legal disputes arising from the use of generated documents.
